_comment: Merge these entries into the project's settings.json hooks object. Adjust the grep and sed patterns to match the project's stage directories.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/({{STAGE_DIRS_PATTERN}})/' || exit 0; stage=$(echo "$f" | sed -E 's|.*/{{PROJECT_DIR_NAME}}/([^/]+)/.*|\1|'); bn=$(basename "$f"); cd "$(dirname "$f")"; git add "$f" && git commit -m "Auto-commit [$stage]: $bn"; } 2>/dev/null || true
